chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P.No.D-5836 of 2024 --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE(S) OF JUDGE(S) ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 1.For order on CMA No.1112/2025 2.For order as to maintainability. 22.01.2025 Mr.Riaz Akhter Soomro, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr.Mir Moula Bux Tunio, Advocate for Respondent Nos.4 and 5. Mr.K.A. Vaswani, A.A.G. ---- On the last date following order was passed:- “15.01.2025 Mr.Fahim Ahmed Shah, Advocate undertakes to file Vakalatnama on behalf of Respondent Nos.7 and 8. Learned counsel for the petitioner is confronted as to maintainability hereof inter alia with respect to Article 248 of the Constitution. Learned counsel is also confronted that how constituting a committee has given rise to cause of action. To come up on 22.01.2025.” Today learned counsel for the petitioner points out that the impugned notification has itself been withdrawn and in view of the issue of maintainability coupled with dissipation of the subject matter no case is made out to entertain this petition, which is dismissed. Judge Judge nasir`
